zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Hughes於1749年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫時，他的父親Thomas John Hughes18歲，母親Sarah Willes14歲。他於大約1777年與Rebecca Allen在美國維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1776年住在美國北卡羅來納州伯克。他於1833年登記服兵役。他去世於1841年1月25日在美國田納西州格林享年92歲，埋葬在美國田納西州布萊德希森 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Hughes于1749年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫时，他的父亲Thomas John Hughes18岁，母亲Sarah Willes14岁。他于大约1777年与Rebecca Allen在美国弗吉尼亚州弗雷德里克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1776年住在美国北卡罗来纳州伯克。他于1833年登记服兵役。他去世于1841年1月25日在美国田纳西州格林享年92岁，埋葬在美国田纳西州布萊德希森 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Tryon Palace
historicEvents.description: Built on August 26, 1767, the Tryon Palace became the capitol building for North Carolina. The building was named after William Tryon a British officer and colonial official.

historicEvents.title: Edenton Tea Party
historicEvents.description: On October 25, 1774, the Edenton Tea Party took place. It was the first organized women's protest. They put their cups down and refused to buy any tea.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Tennessee Becomes a State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1796, Tennessee became the 16th state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Tennessee Secretart of State-From Territory to State

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Trail of Tears
historicEvents.description: In the 1830's, President Jackson called for all the Native Americans to be forced off their own land. As the Cherokee were forced out of North Carolina many of them hid in the mountains of North Carolina.
historicEvents.urlTitle: North Carolina Trail of Tears Association

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Hughes was born in 1749, in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas John Hughes, was 18 and his mother, Sarah Willes, was 14. He married Rebecca Allen about 1777, in Frederick, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Burke, North Carolina, United States in 1776. He registered for military service in 1833. He died on 25 January 1841, in Greene, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 92, and was buried in Hixson Cemetery, Bledsoe, Tennessee, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Hughes est né en 1749, à Dunmore, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas John Hughes, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Sarah Willes, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Allen environ 1777, à Frederick, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Burke, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis en 1776. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1833. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1841, à Greene, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à Hixson Cemetery, Bledsoe, Tennessee, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Hughes 1749 in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas John Hughes 18 und seine Mutter Sarah Willes 14. Er hat um 1777 in Frederick, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Rebecca Allen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1776 hat er in Burke, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er hat sich 1833 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. Januar 1841 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Greene, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Hixson Cemetery, Bledsoe, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Hughes è nato il nel 1749 nel Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas John Hughes, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Willes, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Allen circa 1777, nel Frederick, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Burke, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1776. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1833. Morì il 25 gennaio 1841, nel Greene, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolto a Hixson Cemetery, Bledsoe, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Hughesが1749年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ダンモーで生まれた時，父Thomas John Hughesは18歳，母Sarah Willesは14歳であった。約1777年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州フレデリックでRebecca Allenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1776年にはアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ブルクに住んでいた。彼は1833年に兵役登録をした。彼は1841年1月25日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州グレエンで92歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国テネシー州ブレドソヒクスソン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Hughes(이)가 1749년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas John Hughes(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Willes(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1777년 미국 버지니아 주 프레더릭크에서 Rebecca Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1776년도에 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 버크에서 살았다. 그는 1833년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1841년 1월 25일 미국 테네시 주 그린에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 테네시 주 블레드소 히스슨 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Hughes nasceu em 1749, em Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas John Hughes, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Willes, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Allen aproximadamente 1777, em Frederick, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Burke, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América em 1776. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1833. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1841, em Greene, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, com 92 anos, e foi sepultado em Hixson Cemetery, Bledsoe, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania: филаделфя монтли митинг, филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Hughes родился в 1749 г. в местности дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas John Hughes было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Willes, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Allen около 1777 г. в местности фредирикк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности бурк, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в 1776 году. В 1833 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 января 1841 г. в местности грин, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности хикссон кеметири, бледсо, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Hughes nació en 1749, en Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas John Hughes, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Sarah Willes, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Rebecca Allen aproximadamente 1777, en Frederick, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Burke, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos en 1776. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1833. Murió el 25 de enero de 1841, en Greene, Tennessee, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultado en Hixson Cemetery, Bledsoe, Tennessee, Estados Unidos.
